discovery_domain: exact order-law discovery for the k=4 monotone refill ordered-basis compiler
holdout_domain: the same 13 holdout fact states from v29 to v32
strongest_claim: In the monotone refill transfer case, the k=4 ordered-basis compiler frontier has an exact structural law. An order is exact iff its first four positions either contain bit 3 and at least one of {6,8}, or else contain both 6 and 8 while deferring 3 only ahead of the unique omitted bit from {9,10,12}.
